    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
    <title>Prasanna Precision Tools – Production Portal</title>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react/18.2.0/umd/react.development.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react-dom/18.2.0/umd/react-dom.development.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/babel-standalone/7.23.2/babel.min.js"></script>
    <style>
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;background:#f0f2f5;color:#1a1a2e;min-height:100vh}
    /* ── PORTAL SHELL ── */
    .portal-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e 0%,#16213e 100%);color:#fff;padding:0 24px;height:64px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100}
    .portal-header .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
    .portal-header .brand img{height:40px;width:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,0.2))}
    .portal-header .brand-text h1{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#fff}
    .portal-header .brand-text p{font-size:11px;color:#ff6b00;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}
    .portal-header .header-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
    .user-badge{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:24px;padding:6px 14px 6px 8px}
    .user-avatar{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b00,#ff9500);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
    .user-badge span{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#fff}
    .btn-logout{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:#ccc;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:all 0.2s}
    .btn-logout:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff}
    .today-badge{background:#ff6b00;color:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600}
    /* ── LAYOUT ── */
    .portal-body{display:flex;min-height:calc(100vh - 64px)}
    .sidebar{width:220px;background:#fff;border-right:1px solid #e8eaed;padding:20px 0;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:2px 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)}
    .sidebar-section{padding:6px 16px;margin-bottom:4px}
    .sidebar-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#9aa0a6;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;padding:8px 16px 4px}
    .nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:0;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#5f6368;transition:all 0.15s;border-left:3px solid transparent}
    .nav-item:hover{background:#f8f9fa;color:#1a1a2e}
    .nav-item.active{background:#fff3e8;color:#ff6b00;border-left-color:#ff6b00;font-weight:600}
    .nav-item svg{width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0}
    .main-content{flex:1;padding:28px;overflow-y:auto}
    /* ── PAGE HEADER ── */
    .page-header{margin-bottom:24px}
    .page-header h2{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#1a1a2e}
    .page-header p{font-size:13px;color:#80868b;margin-top:2px}
    /* ── STAT CARDS ── */
    .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-bottom:28px}
    .stat-card{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border:1px solid #f0f0f0;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .stat-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px}
    .stat-card.orange::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ff6b00,#ff9500)}
    .stat-card.blue::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1a73e8,#4285f4)}
    .stat-card.green::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0f9d58,#34a853)}
    .stat-card.red::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ea4335,#f44336)}
    .stat-card .label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#80868b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.8px}
    .stat-card .value{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:#1a1a2e;margin-top:6px;line-height:1}
    .stat-card .icon{position:absolute;right:16px;top:16px;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
    .stat-card.orange .icon{background:#fff3e8;color:#ff6b00}
    .stat-card.blue .icon{background:#e8f0fe;color:#1a73e8}
    .stat-card.green .icon{background:#e6f4ea;color:#0f9d58}
    .stat-card.red .icon{background:#fce8e6;color:#ea4335}
    /* ── CARD ── */
    .card{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border:1px solid #f0f0f0;margin-bottom:20px}
    .card-header{padding:18px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
    .card-header h3{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#1a1a2e}
    .card-header p{font-size:12px;color:#80868b;margin-top:1px}
    .card-body{padding:20px 24px}
    /* ── FORM ── */
    .form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .form-group label{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#5f6368;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.6px;margin-bottom:6px}
    .form-group input,.form-group textarea,.form-group select{width:100%;border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;color:#1a1a2e;background:#fff;transition:all 0.2s;outline:none}
    .form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{border-color:#ff6b00;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(224,124,48,0.12)}
    .form-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .saving-indicator{font-size:12px;color:#80868b;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
    /* ── BUTTONS ── */
    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:10px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:all 0.2s}
    .btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b00,#ff9500);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(224,124,48,0.35)}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e05a00,#e07800);transform:translateY(-1px)}
    .btn-secondary{background:#f8f9fa;color:#5f6368;border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0}
    .btn-secondary:hover{background:#f0f0f0;color:#1a1a2e}
    .btn-danger{background:#fce8e6;color:#ea4335;border:none}
    .btn-danger:hover{background:#ea4335;color:#fff}
    .btn-dark{background:#1a1a2e;color:#fff}
    .btn-dark:hover{background:#0d0d1a}
    .btn:disabled{opacity:0.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none}
    .btn svg{width:15px;height:15px}
    /* ── TABLE ── */
    .table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #f0f0f0}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px}
    thead{background:#f8f9fa}
    th{text-align:left;padding:12px 16px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#80868b;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.6px;white-space:nowrap}
    th.right,td.right{text-align:right}
    td{padding:13px 16px;border-top:1px solid #f5f5f5;color:#3c4043}
    tr:hover td{background:#fafafa}
    .empty-row td{text-align:center;color:#9aa0a6;padding:40px;font-size:13px}
    .delete-btn{background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#dadce0;border-radius:6px;padding:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;transition:all 0.2s}
    .delete-btn:hover{color:#ea4335;background:#fce8e6}
    /* ── TOGGLE ── */
    .toggle-group{display:flex;background:#f0f2f5;border-radius:10px;padding:3px;gap:2px}
    .toggle-btn{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:transparent;color:#5f6368;transition:all 0.2s}
    .toggle-btn.active{background:#fff;color:#ff6b00;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)}
    /* ── LOGIN PAGE ── */
    .login-page{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e 0%,#16213e 60%,#0f3460 100%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px}
    .login-box{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:40px;width:100%;max-width:420px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)}
    .login-logo{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;margin-bottom:28px;text-align:center}
    .login-logo img{height:72px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .login-logo h2{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#1a1a2e}
    .login-logo p{font-size:12px;color:#ff6b00;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px}
    .login-divider{font-size:11px;color:#9aa0a6;text-align:center;margin:10px 0;font-weight:500}
    .roster-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;max-height:130px;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px 0}
    .chip{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;background:#fff;color:#5f6368;transition:all 0.15s}
    .chip:hover{border-color:#ff6b00;color:#ff6b00}
    .chip.selected{border-color:#ff6b00;background:#fff3e8;color:#ff6b00;font-weight:600}
    .error-msg{background:#fce8e6;color:#ea4335;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;margin-top:8px}
    .admin-link{color:#9aa0a6;font-size:12px;text-align:center;margin-top:16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px}
    .admin-link:hover{color:#1a1a2e}
    /* ── ADMIN PIN PAGE ── */
    .pin-page{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e,#16213e);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px}
    .pin-box{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:40px;width:100%;max-width:360px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)}
    .pin-icon{width:56px;height:56px;background:#1a1a2e;border-radius:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 20px}
    .pin-input{text-align:center;letter-spacing:8px;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;padding:14px}
    /* ── ROSTER ── */
    .roster-list{list-style:none;max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto}
    .roster-item{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #f5f5f5}
    .roster-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .roster-item:hover{background:#fafafa}
    .roster-item span{font-size:13px;color:#3c4043}
    /* ── FILTER BAR ── */
    .filter-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px}
    .search-input{flex:1;min-width:180px;border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:10px;padding:9px 14px;font-size:13px;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s}
    .search-input:focus{border-color:#ff6b00}
    /* ── SPIN ── */
    .spin{animation:spin 1s linear infinite}
    @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
    .loading-center{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;padding:60px;color:#80868b;font-size:13px}
    /* ── BOTTOM NAV (mobile) ── */
    .bottom-nav{display:none;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:#fff;border-top:1px solid #e8eaed;z-index:200;padding:0;box-shadow:0 -2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)}
    .bottom-nav-inner{display:flex;justify-content:space-around;align-items:stretch}
    .bnav-item{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:10px 4px 12px;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:transparent;color:#9aa0a6;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;gap:4px;transition:color 0.15s;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    .bnav-item svg{width:22px;height:22px}
    .bnav-item.active{color:#ff6b00}
    .bnav-item span{letter-spacing:0.3px}
    /* ── ENTRY CARDS (mobile history) ── */
    .entry-card{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid #f0f0f0;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
    .entry-card-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px}
    .entry-card-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#1a1a2e}
    .entry-card-date{font-size:12px;color:#80868b;font-weight:500}
    .entry-card-pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px}
    .pill{padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600}
    .pill-shift{background:#e8f0fe;color:#1a73e8}
    .pill-time{background:#f0f0f0;color:#5f6368}
    .pill-code{background:#fff3e8;color:#ff6b00}
    .entry-card-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
    .entry-card-stat{background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px}
    .entry-card-stat .ecs-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#9aa0a6;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-bottom:2px}
    .entry-card-stat .ecs-value{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#1a1a2e}
    .entry-card-stat.rej .ecs-value{color:#ea4335}
    .entry-card-stat.ok .ecs-value{color:#0f9d58}
    .entry-card-footer{margin-top:10px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #f5f5f5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px}
    .entry-card-remarks{font-size:12px;color:#80868b;flex:1}
    .entry-card-spec{font-size:11px;color:#5f6368;margin-top:6px}
    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media(max-width:768px){
    /* header compact */
    .portal-header{height:56px;padding:0 16px}
    .portal-header .brand img{height:32px}
    .portal-header .brand-text h1{font-size:14px}
    .portal-header .brand-text p{display:none}
    .today-badge{display:none}
    .user-badge span{display:none}
    .user-badge{padding:6px 8px}
    .btn-logout span{display:none}
    .btn-logout{padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px}
    /* layout */
    .sidebar{display:none}
    .bottom-nav{display:block}
    .portal-body{min-height:calc(100vh - 56px)}
    .main-content{padding:14px 14px 80px}
    /* form */
    .form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
    .form-group input,.form-group select,.form-group textarea{padding:13px 14px;font-size:16px;border-radius:12px}
    .form-group label{font-size:11px}
    /* stats */
    .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px}
    .stat-card{padding:14px 14px 16px;border-radius:12px}
    .stat-card .value{font-size:24px}
    .stat-card .label{font-size:10px}
    .stat-card .icon{width:30px;height:30px;top:12px;right:12px}
    /* page header */
    .page-header{margin-bottom:16px}
    .page-header h2{font-size:18px}
    /* card */
    .card-header{padding:14px 16px}
    .card-body{padding:14px 16px}
    /* hide desktop tables on mobile for history/dashboard */
    .mobile-hide{display:none!important}
    .mobile-cards{display:block}
    /* buttons */
    .btn{padding:12px 16px;font-size:13px;border-radius:12px}
    .btn-primary{box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(224,124,48,0.35)}
    /* toggle */
    .toggle-group{flex:1}
    .toggle-btn{flex:1;text-align:center}
    /* login */
    .login-box{padding:28px 20px;border-radius:16px}
    .chip{padding:9px 16px;font-size:13px}
    /* filter */
    .filter-bar{gap:8px}
    /* admin table still scrolls */
    .table-wrap{-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
    }
    @media(min-width:769px){
    .mobile-cards{display:none}
    .bottom-nav{display:none}
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <div id="root"></div>
    <script>
    window.LOGO_SRC = "data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/4gHYSUNDX1BST0ZJTEUAAQEAAAHIAAAAAAQwAABtbnRyUkdCIFhZWiAH4AABAAEAAAAAAABhY3NwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAQAA9tYAAQAAAADTLQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAlkZXNjAAAA8AAAACRyWFlaAAABFAAAABRnWFlaAAABKAAAABRiWFlaAAABPAAAABR3dHB0AAABUAAAABRyVFJDAAABZAAAAChnVFJDAAABZAAAAChiVFJDAAABZAAAAChjcHJ0AAABjAAAADxtbHVjAAAAAAAAAAEAAAAMZW5VUwAAAAgAAAAcAHMAUgBHAEJYWVogAAAAAAAAb6IAADj1AAADkFhZWiAAAAAAAABimQAAt4UAABjaWFlaIAAAAAAAACSgAAAPhAAAts9YWVogAAAAAAAA9tYAAQAAAADTLXBhcmEAAAAAAAQAAAACZmYAAPKnAAANWQAAE9AAAApbAAAAAAAAAABtbHVjAAAAAAAAAAEAAAAMZW5VUwAAACAAAAAcAEcAbwBvAGcAbABlACAASQBuAGMALgAgADIAMAAxADb/2wBDAAMCAgICAgMCAgIDAwMDBAYEBAQEBAgGBgUGCQgKCgkICQkKDA8MCgsOCwkJDRENDg8QEBEQCgwSExIQEw8QEBD/2wBDAQMDAwQDBAgEBAgQCwkLEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBAQEBD/wAARCACvALcDASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAHQABAAIDAQEBAQAAAAAAAAAAAAcIBAUGAwIBCf/EAEoQAAEDAwIEBAMFAgkJCQEAAAECAwQABREGBxIhMUEIE1FhFCJxMkJSgZGhwRUWIzM0U2Lh8DZDdHWCkrGz0RcYNTdVcpSyw/H/xAAcAQACAgMBAQAAAAAAAAAAAAAABwUGAQMEAgj/xAA6EQABAgQDBQQJBAEFAQAAAAABAgMABAURBiFREjFBYXETMoGhBxQVIlKRsdHwJGKSwSMzouHi8UL/2gAMAwEAAhEDEQA/AP6e0pSiCFKUoghSlKIIUpSiCFFKCQVKIAAySe1FKCQVKIAAySe1Vv3q3qN6L+kdIyiLeCW5kxs/0n1Qg/1fqfvfT7ULXa7LUGWL75uT3U8VH7anh1sImaHQ5muzIYYFgO8rgkffQcfmY3e4PiONuuDlp0NGiyksEocnPgqQpXfy0gjIH4icHsMYJ1GkfEvemp7cfWUGM/CcUEqkRmyh1rJ+0U5IUB6AA/XpUI0pJO41rLk16yHbZ90d22luPU584dTeC6MiV9WLV8u9/wDV9b8Om7lF9IM6HcobNwt8luRGkIDjTraspWk9CDXtVTtot3ZmgpibVdVOSLFIXlaBzVGUeriB6eqe/Uc+tq4M6HcobNwt8luRGkIDjTraspWk9CDTlw5iOXxBL7aMnB3k6cxqDwPgYTuIsOzFAmNhebZ7qteR0I4iPalKVYor0KUpRBClKUQQpSlEEKUpRBClKUQQpSlEEKUpRBCilBIKlEAAZJPailBIKlEAAZJPaq371b1G9F/SOkZRFvBLcyY2f6T6oQf6v1P3vp9qFrtdlqDLF983J7qeKj9tTw62ETNDoczXZkMMCwHeVwSPvoOPzMN6t6jei/pHSMoi3gluZMbP9J9UIP8AV+p+99PtQrStppnTN51feY9hsMRUiVIPIdEoT3Wo9kjuf318+1KpTmIJztnveWo2AHDQAfl+sP8Ap1Ok6BJ9k17qE5knjqSfy3SNXSrY6R8NGhrPDbVqVDt6nFILhU6tplKu4QlBBI91E564HSs+++HLbK7RFNQLW9aZGPkfjSFqwe2UrKkkfkD71ZkejqsLZ7UlAPwk     window.SHEET_URL = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbzdE2p6hqQtQmFN8zk3lUxwAf8yh4KKApuygobI7k2a9W6_GnyO_bxT_GxkDQEMsFpI/exec";
    window.ADMIN_PIN = "1901";
    </script>
    <script type="text/babel">
    const {useState,useEffect,useMemo} = React;
    const LOGO_SRC = window.LOGO_SRC;
    const SHEET_URL = window.SHEET_URL;
    const ADMIN_PIN = window.ADMIN_PIN;
    // ── API ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const api = {
    async get(p){ const r=await fetch(SHEET_URL+"?"+new URLSearchParams(p)); return r.json(); },
    async post(b){ await fetch(SHEET_URL,{method:"POST",body:JSON.stringify(b)}); }
    };
    // ── HELPERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function uid(){ return Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7); }
    function today(){ return new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); }
    function norm(s){ return s.trim().replace(/\s+/g," "); }
    function fmtDate(d){ if(!d) return ""; const [y,m,day]=d.split("-"); return `${day}/${m}/${y}`; }
    function initials(name){ return name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2).toUpperCase(); }
    // ── ICONS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const SVG = {
    logout: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4"/><polyline points="16 17 21 12 16 7"/><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="9" y2="12"/></svg>,
    home: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>,
    plus: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>,
    list: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><line x1="8" y1="6" x2="21" y2="6"/><line x1="8" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="8" y1="18" x2="21" y2="18"/><line x1="3" y1="6" x2="3.01" y2="6"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="3.01" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="18" x2="3.01" y2="18"/></svg>,
    download: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>,
    shield: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/><polyline points="9 12 11 14 15 10"/></svg>,
    users: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/><path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/><path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/></svg>,
    back: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><line x1="19" y1="12" x2="5" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 19 5 12 12 5"/></svg>,
    trash: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><polyline points="3 6 5 6 21 6"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14H6L5 6"/><path d="M10 11v6"/><path d="M14 11v6"/><path d="M9 6V4h6v2"/></svg>,
    x: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg>,
    loader: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" className="spin"><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="6"/><line x1="12" y1="18" x2="12" y2="22"/><line x1="4.93" y1="4.93" x2="7.76" y2="7.76"/><line x1="16.24" y1="16.24" x2="19.07" y2="19.07"/><line x1="2" y1="12" x2="6" y2="12"/><line x1="18" y1="12" x2="22" y2="12"/><line x1="4.93" y1="19.07" x2="7.76" y2="16.24"/><line x1="16.24" y1="7.76" x2="19.07" y2="4.93"/></svg>,
    wrench: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M14.7 6.3a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.4l1.6 1.6a1 1 0 0 0 1.4 0l3.77-3.77a6 6 0 0 1-7.94 7.94l-6.91 6.91a2.12 2.12 0 0 1-3-3l6.91-6.91a6 6 0 0 1 7.94-7.94l-3.76 3.76z"/></svg>,
    box: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/></svg>,
    alert: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/></svg>,
    };
    // ── MAIN APP ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function App() {
    const [mode,setMode] = useState("login"); // login|employee|adminPin|admin|roster
    const [roster,setRoster] = useState([]);
    const [currentEmployee,setCurrentEmployee] = useState(null);
    const [nameInput,setNameInput] = useState("");
    const [loginError,setLoginError] = useState("");
    const [entries,setEntries] = useState([]);
    const [loadingEntries,setLoadingEntries] = useState(false);
    const [saving,setSaving] = useState(false);
    const [formError,setFormError] = useState("");
    const [toolName,setToolName] = useState("");
    const [quantity,setQuantity] = useState("");
    const [rejections,setRejections] = useState("");
    const [date,setDate] = useState(today());
    const [inTime,setInTime] = useState("");
    const [outTime,setOutTime] = useState("");
    const [shift,setShift] = useState("");
    const [toolCode,setToolCode] = useState("");
    const [parameter,setParameter] = useState("");
    const [specification,setSpecification] = useState("");
    const [totalQuantity,setTotalQuantity] = useState("");
    const [remarks,setRemarks] = useState("");
    const [showTodayOnly,setShowTodayOnly] = useState(true);
    const [activeTab,setActiveTab] = useState("dashboard"); // dashboard|add|history
    const [pinInput,setPinInput] = useState("");
    const [pinError,setPinError] = useState("");
    const [adminData,setAdminData] = useState([]);
    const [loadingAdmin,setLoadingAdmin] = useState(false);
    const [adminSearch,setAdminSearch] = useState("");
    const [adminTab,setAdminTab] = useState("overview"); // overview|roster
    const [newNameInput,setNewNameInput] = useState("");
    const [bulkInput,setBulkInput] = useState("");
    const [rosterMsg,setRosterMsg] = useState("");
    useEffect(()=>{
    api.get({action:"getRoster"}).then(r=>{ if(Array.isArray(r)) setRoster(r); }).catch(()=>{});
    },[]);
    // ── Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function handleLogin(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    const name=norm(nameInput);
    if(!name){setLoginError("Please enter your name.");return;}
    setLoginError("");
    setCurrentEmployee(name);
    if(!roster.includes(name)){
    setRoster(prev=>[...prev,name].sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b)));
    api.post({action:"upsertRoster",name});
    }
    setLoadingEntries(true);
    api.get({action:"getEntries",employee:name}).then(d=>{
    setEntries(Array.isArray(d)?d:[]);
    }).catch(()=>setEntries([])).finally(()=>setLoadingEntries(false));
    setMode("employee");
    setActiveTab("dashboard");
    }
    function handleLogout(){
    setCurrentEmployee(null); setEntries([]); setNameInput("");
    setToolName(""); setQuantity(""); setRejections(""); setDate(today());
    setInTime(""); setOutTime(""); setShift(""); setToolCode("");
    setParameter(""); setSpecification(""); setTotalQuantity(""); setRemarks("");
    setMode("login");
    }
    async function handleAdminLogin(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    if(pinInput!==ADMIN_PIN){setPinError("Incorrect PIN.");return;}
    setPinError(""); setMode("admin"); setAdminTab("overview"); setLoadingAdmin(true);
    try{
    const all=await api.get({action:"getAllEntries"});
    const map={};
    (Array.isArray(all)?all:[]).forEach(e=>{
    if(!map[e.employee]) map[e.employee]=[];
    map[e.employee].push(e);
    });
    setAdminData(Object.keys(map).map(n=>({employee:n,entries:map[n]})));
    }catch(e){setAdminData([]);}
    finally{setLoadingAdmin(false);}
    }
    // ── Entries ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function addEntry(e){
    e.preventDefault(); setFormError("");
    if(!toolName.trim()||!quantity||!date){setFormError("Please fill in all fields.");return;}
    const qty=Number(quantity);
    if(!Number.isFinite(qty)||qty<=0){setFormError("Quantity must be a positive number.");return;}
    const rej=Number(rejections);
    const totQty=Number(totalQuantity);
    const entry={id:uid(),toolName:toolName.trim(),quantity:qty,rejections:Number.isFinite(rej)&&rej>=0?rej:0,date,employee:currentEmployee,createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),inTime:inTime.trim(),outTime:outTime.trim(),shift:shift.trim(),toolCode:toolCode.trim(),parameter:parameter.trim(),specification:specification.trim(),totalQuantity:Number.isFinite(totQty)&&totQty>=0?totQty:0,remarks:remarks.trim()};
    setSaving(true);
    try{
    await api.post({action:"addEntry",...entry});
    setEntries(prev=>[entry,...prev]);
    setToolName(""); setQuantity(""); setRejections("");
    setInTime(""); setOutTime(""); setShift(""); setToolCode("");
    setParameter(""); setSpecification(""); setTotalQuantity(""); setRemarks("");
    setActiveTab("history");
    }catch(err){setFormError("Could not save. Check your connection.");}
    finally{setSaving(false);}
    }
    async function deleteEntry(id){
    setEntries(prev=>prev.filter(en=>en.id!==id));
    try{ await api.post({action:"deleteEntry",id}); }catch(e){}
    }
    function exportCSV(){
    const rows=[...entries].sort((a,b)=>a.date<b.date?1:-1);
    const csv=[["Date","In Time","Out Time","Shift","Tool Code","Tool Description","Parameter","Actual","Quantity","Total Quantity","Rejections","Remarks"],
    ...rows.map(e=>[e.date,e.inTime||"",e.outTime||"",e.shift||"",e.toolCode||"",e.toolName,e.parameter||"",e.specification||"",e.quantity,e.totalQuantity||0,e.rejections||0,e.remarks||""])]
    .map(r=>r.map(c=>`"${String(c).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(",")).join("\n");
    dl(csv,`${currentEmployee.replace(/\s+/g,"_")}_${today()}.csv`);
    }
    function exportAdminCSV(){
    const csv=[["Date","Employee","In Time","Out Time","Shift","Tool Code","Tool Description","Parameter","Actual","Quantity","Total Quantity","Rejections","Remarks"],
    ...adminRows.map(e=>[e.date,e.employee,e.inTime||"",e.outTime||"",e.shift||"",e.toolCode||"",e.toolName,e.parameter||"",e.specification||"",e.quantity,e.totalQuantity||0,e.rejections||0,e.remarks||""])]
    .map(r=>r.map(c=>`"${String(c).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(",")).join("\n");
    dl(csv,`all_entries_${today()}.csv`);
    }
    function dl(csv,name){
    const a=Object.assign(document.createElement("a"),{href:URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([csv],{type:"text/csv"})),download:name});
    document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();document.body.removeChild(a);
    }
    // ── Roster ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    async function addSingleName(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    const name=norm(newNameInput); if(!name) return;
    if(roster.includes(name)){setRosterMsg(`"${name}" already exists.`);return;}
    setRoster(prev=>[...prev,name].sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b)));
    setNewNameInput(""); setRosterMsg(`Added "${name}".`);
    await api.post({action:"upsertRoster",name});
    }
    async function bulkAdd(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    const names=bulkInput.split("\n").map(norm).filter(Boolean);
    const toAdd=names.filter(n=>!roster.includes(n));
    if(!toAdd.length){setRosterMsg("All names already exist.");return;}
    setRoster(prev=>[...prev,...toAdd].sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b)));
    setBulkInput(""); setRosterMsg(`Added ${toAdd.length} name(s). Saving...`);
    for(const name of toAdd) await api.post({action:"upsertRoster",name});
    setRosterMsg(`Added ${toAdd.length} name(s).`);
    }
    function removeName(name){
    setRoster(r=>r.filter(n=>n!==name));
    setRosterMsg(`Removed "${name}" from view.`);
    }
    // ── Computed ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const filteredEntries = useMemo(()=>{
    let list=[...entries];
    if(showTodayOnly) list=list.filter(e=>e.date===today());
    return list.sort((a,b)=>a.date<b.date?1:-1);
    },[entries,showTodayOnly]);
    const myTotals = useMemo(()=>({
    todayQty: entries.filter(e=>e.date===today()).reduce((s,e)=>s+e.quantity,0),
    todayRej: entries.filter(e=>e.date===today()).reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.rejections||0),0),
    allQty: entries.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.quantity,0),
    allRej: entries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.rejections||0),0),
    tools: new Set(entries.map(e=>e.toolName)).size,
    days: new Set(entries.map(e=>e.date)).size,
    }),[entries]);
    const adminRows = useMemo(()=>{
    const rows=[];
    for(const {employee,entries:list} of adminData)
    for(const e of list) rows.push({...e,employee});
    rows.sort((a,b)=>a.date<b.date?1:-1);
    if(adminSearch.trim()){
    const q=adminSearch.trim().toLowerCase();
    return rows.filter(r=>r.employee.toLowerCase().includes(q)||r.toolName.toLowerCase().includes(q));
    }
    return rows;
    },[adminData,adminSearch]);
    const adminTotals = useMemo(()=>({
    qty: adminRows.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.quantity,0),
    rej: adminRows.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.rejections||0),0),
    emps: new Set(adminRows.map(e=>e.employee)).size,
    tools:new Set(adminRows.map(e=>e.toolName)).size,
    count:adminRows.length,
    }),[adminRows]);
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // SCREENS
    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    // ── LOGIN ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if(mode==="login") return (
    <div className="login-page">
    <div className="login-box">
    <div className="login-logo">
    <img src={LOGO_SRC} alt="Prasanna Precision Tools"/>
    <h2>Production Portal</h2>
    <p>Prasanna Precision Tools</p>
    </div>
    <form onSubmit={handleLogin}>
    <div className="form-group" style={{marginBottom:12}}>
    <label>Your Name</label>
    <input type="text" value={nameInput} onChange={e=>setNameInput(e.target.value)} placeholder="Type your full name..." autoFocus/>
    </div>
    {roster.length>0 && <>
    <div className="login-divider">or select from roster</div>
    <div className="roster-chips" style={{marginBottom:14}}>
    {roster.map(n=>(
    <div key={n} className={`chip ${nameInput===n?"selected":""}`} onClick={()=>setNameInput(n)}>{n}</div>
    ))}
    </div>
    </>}
    {loginError && <div className="error-msg">{loginError}</div>}
    <button type="submit" className="btn btn-primary" style={{width:"100%",justifyContent:"center",marginTop:14,padding:"12px"}}>
    {SVG.home} Sign In to Portal
    </button>
    </form>
    <div className="admin-link" onClick={()=>{setPinInput("");setPinError("");setMode("adminPin");}}>
    {SVG.shield} Admin Login
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    );
    // ── ADMIN PIN ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if(mode==="adminPin") return (
    <div className="pin-page">
    <div className="pin-box">
    <button onClick={()=>setMode("login")} className="btn btn-secondary" style={{marginBottom:20,fontSize:12}}>
    {SVG.back} Back
    </button>
    <div className="pin-icon">{SVG.shield}</div>
    <h2 style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:6}}>Admin Access</h2>
    <p style={{fontSize:12,color:"#80868b",marginBottom:24}}>Enter your admin PIN to continue</p>
    <form onSubmit={handleAdminLogin}>
    <div className="form-group" style={{marginBottom:14}}>
    <input type="password" inputMode="numeric" className="pin-input" value={pinInput} onChange={e=>setPinInput(e.target.value)} placeholder="••••" autoFocus style={{textAlign:"center",letterSpacing:"8px",fontSize:"22px",fontWeight:700}}/>
    </div>
    {pinError && <div className="error-msg" style={{marginBottom:12}}>{pinError}</div>}
    <button type="submit" className="btn btn-dark" style={{width:"100%",justifyContent:"center",padding:"12px"}}>
    Unlock Dashboard
    </button>
    </form>
    </div>
    </div>
    );
    // ── ADMIN PORTAL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if(mode==="admin") return (
    <div>
    <div className="portal-header">
    <div className="brand">
    <img src={LOGO_SRC} alt="logo"/>
    <div className="brand-text">
    <h1>Production Portal</h1>
    <p>Admin Dashboard</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="header-right">
    <div className="user-badge">
    <div className="user-avatar">AD</div>
    <span>Administrator</span>
    </div>
    <button className="btn-logout" onClick={()=>setMode("login")}>{SVG.logout} Exit</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="portal-body">
    <div className="sidebar">
    <div className="sidebar-label">Admin Menu</div>
    <div className={`nav-item ${adminTab==="overview"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setAdminTab("overview")}>{SVG.home} Overview</div>
    <div className={`nav-item ${adminTab==="roster"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setAdminTab("roster")}>{SVG.users} Manage Roster</div>
    </div>
    <div className="main-content">
    {adminTab==="overview" && <>
    <div className="page-header">
    <h2>All Employees Overview</h2>
    <p>Real-time production data from Google Sheets</p>
    </div>
    {loadingAdmin?(
    <div className="loading-center">{SVG.loader} Loading all entries…</div>
    ):<>
    <div className="stats-grid">
    <div className="stat-card orange"><div className="label">Total Entries</div><div className="value">{adminTotals.count}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.list}</div></div>
    <div className="stat-card blue"><div className="label">Tools Produced</div><div className="value">{adminTotals.qty}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.wrench}</div></div>
    <div className="stat-card green"><div className="label">Employees</div><div className="value">{adminTotals.emps}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.users}</div></div>
    <div className="stat-card red"><div className="label">Rejections</div><div className="value">{adminTotals.rej}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.alert}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div className="card">
    <div className="card-header">
    <div><h3>All Production Entries</h3><p>{adminRows.length} records</p></div>
    <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={exportAdminCSV} disabled={adminRows.length===0}>{SVG.download} Export CSV</button>
    </div>
    <div className="card-body" style={{paddingBottom:0}}>
    <div className="filter-bar">
    <input className="search-input" type="text" value={adminSearch} onChange={e=>setAdminSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search by employee or tool name…"/>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="table-wrap" style={{margin:"0 24px 24px"}}>
    <table>
    <thead><tr>
    <th>Date</th><th>Employee</th><th>Shift</th><th>In Time</th><th>Out Time</th><th>Tool Code</th><th>Tool Description</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Actual</th><th className="right">Qty</th><th className="right">Total Qty</th><th className="right">Rejections</th><th>Remarks</th>
    </tr></thead>
    <tbody>
    {adminRows.length===0
    ?<tr className="empty-row"><td colSpan={13}>No entries found.</td></tr>
    :adminRows.map(e=>(
    <tr key={e.employee+e.id}>
    <td style={{color:"#80868b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{fmtDate(e.date)}</td>
    <td><div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8}}><div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#ff6b00,#ff9500)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{initials(e.employee)}</div>{e.employee}</div></td>
    <td>{e.shift||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.inTime||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.outTime||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{fontWeight:500}}>{e.toolCode||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{fontWeight:500}}>{e.toolName}</td>
    <td>{e.parameter||"—"}</td>
    <td>{e.specification||"—"}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{fontWeight:600}}>{e.quantity}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{fontWeight:600}}>{e.totalQuantity||0}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{color:e.rejections>0?"#ea4335":"#34a853",fontWeight:600}}>{e.rejections||0}</td>
    <td style={{color:"#80868b"}}>{e.remarks||"—"}</td>
    </tr>
    ))
    }
    </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    </>}
    </>}
    {adminTab==="roster" && <>
    <div className="page-header">
    <h2>Manage Employee Roster</h2>
    <p>{roster.length} employees registered</p>
    </div>
    {rosterMsg && <div style={{background:"#e6f4ea",color:"#0f9d58",borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 16px",fontSize:13,marginBottom:16,fontWeight:500}}>{rosterMsg}</div>}
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:20}}>
    <div className="card">
    <div className="card-header"><div><h3>Add Employee</h3><p>Single entry</p></div></div>
    <div className="card-body">
    <form onSubmit={addSingleName}>
    <div className="form-group" style={{marginBottom:12}}>
    <label>Full Name</label>
    <input type="text" value={newNameInput} onChange={e=>setNewNameInput(e.target.value)} placeholder="Employee full name"/>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" className="btn btn-primary">{SVG.plus} Add Employee</button>
    </form>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="card">
    <div className="card-header"><div><h3>Bulk Add</h3><p>One name per line</p></div></div>
    <div className="card-body">
    <form onSubmit={bulkAdd}>
    <div className="form-group" style={{marginBottom:12}}>
    <label>Names List</label>
    <textarea value={bulkInput} onChange={e=>setBulkInput(e.target.value)} rows={4} placeholder={"Alice Sharma\nBob Rajan\nCharles Muthu"} style={{fontFamily:"monospace",resize:"vertical"}}/>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" className="btn btn-primary">{SVG.plus} Add All</button>
    </form>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="card" style={{marginTop:20}}>
    <div className="card-header"><h3>Current Roster ({roster.length})</h3></div>
    <ul className="roster-list">
    {roster.length===0
    ?<li style={{padding:"24px",textAlign:"center",color:"#9aa0a6",fontSize:13}}>No employees yet.</li>
    :roster.map(name=>(
    <li key={name} className="roster-item">
    <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
    <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#1a1a2e,#0f3460)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{initials(name)}</div>
    <span>{name}</span>
    </div>
    <button className="delete-btn" onClick={()=>removeName(name)} style={{width:28,height:28}}>{SVG.x}</button>
    </li>
    ))
    }
    </ul>
    </div>
    </>}
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    );
    // ── ENTRY CARD (mobile) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    function EntryCard({e,onDelete}){
    return (
    <div className="entry-card">
    <div className="entry-card-header">
    <div className="entry-card-title">{e.toolName}</div>
    <div className="entry-card-date">{fmtDate(e.date)}</div>
    </div>
    <div className="entry-card-pills">
    {e.shift && <span className="pill pill-shift">{e.shift}</span>}
    {(e.inTime||e.outTime) && <span className="pill pill-time">{e.inTime||"?"} – {e.outTime||"?"}</span>}
    {e.toolCode && <span className="pill pill-code">{e.toolCode}</span>}
    </div>
    <div className="entry-card-grid">
    <div className="entry-card-stat"><div className="ecs-label">Qty Produced</div><div className="ecs-value">{e.quantity}</div></div>
    <div className="entry-card-stat"><div className="ecs-label">Total Qty</div><div className="ecs-value">{e.totalQuantity||0}</div></div>
    <div className={`entry-card-stat ${e.rejections>0?"rej":"ok"}`}><div className="ecs-label">Rejections</div><div className="ecs-value">{e.rejections||0}</div></div>
    {e.parameter && <div className="entry-card-stat"><div className="ecs-label">Parameter</div><div className="ecs-value" style={{fontSize:13}}>{e.parameter}</div></div>}
    </div>
    {(e.specification||e.remarks) && (
    <div className="entry-card-spec">
    {e.specification && <span>Spec: {e.specification}</span>}
    {e.specification && e.remarks && " · "}
    {e.remarks && <span>{e.remarks}</span>}
    </div>
    )}
    {onDelete && (
    <div className="entry-card-footer">
    <div className="entry-card-remarks"></div>
    <button className="delete-btn" onClick={()=>onDelete(e.id)} style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:10,background:"#fce8e6"}}>{SVG.trash}</button>
    </div>
    )}
    </div>
    );
    }
    // ── EMPLOYEE PORTAL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    return (
    <div>
    <div className="portal-header">
    <div className="brand">
    <img src={LOGO_SRC} alt="logo"/>
    <div className="brand-text">
    <h1>Production Portal</h1>
    <p>Prasanna Precision Tools</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="header-right">
    <span className="today-badge">{fmtDate(today())}</span>
    <div className="user-badge">
    <div className="user-avatar">{initials(currentEmployee)}</div>
    <span>{currentEmployee}</span>
    </div>
    <button className="btn-logout" onClick={handleLogout}>{SVG.logout} <span>Sign Out</span></button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="portal-body">
    <div className="sidebar">
    <div className="sidebar-label">My Workspace</div>
    <div className={`nav-item ${activeTab==="dashboard"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("dashboard")}>{SVG.home} Dashboard</div>
    <div className={`nav-item ${activeTab==="add"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("add")}>{SVG.plus} Add Entry</div>
    <div className={`nav-item ${activeTab==="history"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("history")}>{SVG.list} My History</div>
    </div>
    <div className="main-content">
    {loadingEntries?(
    <div className="loading-center">{SVG.loader} Loading your data…</div>
    ):<>
    {/* DASHBOARD TAB */}
    {activeTab==="dashboard" && <>
    <div className="page-header">
    <h2>Welcome, {currentEmployee.split(" ")[0]}!</h2>
    <p>Production summary for today</p>
    </div>
    <div className="stats-grid">
    <div className="stat-card orange"><div className="label">Today's Output</div><div className="value">{myTotals.todayQty}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.box}</div></div>
    <div className="stat-card red"><div className="label">Today's Rejects</div><div className="value">{myTotals.todayRej}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.alert}</div></div>
    <div className="stat-card blue"><div className="label">All-time Output</div><div className="value">{myTotals.allQty}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.wrench}</div></div>
    <div className="stat-card green"><div className="label">Days Worked</div><div className="value">{myTotals.days}</div><div className="icon">{SVG.home}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div className="card">
    <div className="card-header">
    <div><h3>Today's Entries</h3><p>{fmtDate(today())}</p></div>
    <button className="btn btn-primary" onClick={()=>setActiveTab("add")}>{SVG.plus} Add</button>
    </div>
    {/* Desktop table */}
    <div className="table-wrap mobile-hide" style={{margin:"0 24px 24px"}}>
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th>Shift</th><th>In</th><th>Out</th><th>Code</th><th>Tool</th><th>Param</th><th>Spec</th><th className="right">Qty</th><th className="right">Total</th><th className="right">Rej</th><th>Remarks</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
    {entries.filter(e=>e.date===today()).length===0
    ?<tr className="empty-row"><td colSpan={11}>No entries today yet.</td></tr>
    :entries.filter(e=>e.date===today()).sort((a,b)=>a.createdAt<b.createdAt?1:-1).map(e=>(
    <tr key={e.id}>
    <td>{e.shift||"—"}</td><td style={{whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.inTime||"—"}</td><td style={{whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.outTime||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{fontWeight:500}}>{e.toolCode||"—"}</td><td style={{fontWeight:500}}>{e.toolName}</td>
    <td>{e.parameter||"—"}</td><td>{e.specification||"—"}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{fontWeight:600}}>{e.quantity}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{fontWeight:600}}>{e.totalQuantity||0}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{color:e.rejections>0?"#ea4335":"#34a853",fontWeight:600}}>{e.rejections||0}</td>
    <td style={{color:"#80868b"}}>{e.remarks||"—"}</td>
    </tr>
    ))
    }
    </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    {/* Mobile cards */}
    <div className="mobile-cards" style={{padding:"0 14px 14px"}}>
    {entries.filter(e=>e.date===today()).length===0
    ?<div style={{textAlign:"center",color:"#9aa0a6",padding:"32px 0",fontSize:13}}>No entries today yet. Tap + to add.</div>
    :entries.filter(e=>e.date===today()).sort((a,b)=>a.createdAt<b.createdAt?1:-1).map(e=>(
    <EntryCard key={e.id} e={e} onDelete={null}/>
    ))
    }
    </div>
    </div>
    </>}
    {/* ADD ENTRY TAB */}
    {activeTab==="add" && <>
    <div className="page-header">
    <h2>Add Entry</h2>
    <p>Record tools manufactured</p>
    </div>
    <div className="card">
    <div className="card-header"><h3>New Entry</h3></div>
    <div className="card-body">
    <form onSubmit={addEntry}>
    <div className="form-grid">
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Date</label>
    <input type="date" value={date} onChange={e=>setDate(e.target.value)}/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Shift</label>
    <select value={shift} onChange={e=>setShift(e.target.value)}>
    <option value="">Select Shift</option>
    <option value="Day">Day</option>
    <option value="Night">Night</option>
    <option value="General">General</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>In Time</label>
    <input type="time" value={inTime} onChange={e=>setInTime(e.target.value)}/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Out Time</label>
    <input type="time" value={outTime} onChange={e=>setOutTime(e.target.value)}/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Tool Code</label>
    <input type="text" value={toolCode} onChange={e=>setToolCode(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. TC-001"/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Tool Description</label>
    <input type="text" value={toolName} onChange={e=>setToolName(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. Hex Wrench"/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Parameter</label>
    <input type="text" value={parameter} onChange={e=>setParameter(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. Dia 5mm"/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Actual</label>
    <input type="text" value={specification} onChange={e=>setSpecification(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. ISO 4762"/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Qty Produced</label>
    <input type="number" min="1" value={quantity} onChange={e=>setQuantity(e.target.value)} placeholder="50" inputMode="numeric"/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Total Quantity</label>
    <input type="number" min="0" value={totalQuantity} onChange={e=>setTotalQuantity(e.target.value)} placeholder="200" inputMode="numeric"/>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group">
    <label>Rejections</label>
    <input type="number" min="0" value={rejections} onChange={e=>setRejections(e.target.value)} placeholder="0" inputMode="numeric"/>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div className="form-group" style={{marginBottom:14}}>
    <label>Remarks</label>
    <input type="text" value={remarks} onChange={e=>setRemarks(e.target.value)} placeholder="Any notes or observations…"/>
    </div>
    {formError && <div className="error-msg" style={{marginBottom:14}}>{formError}</div>}
    <button type="submit" className="btn btn-primary" disabled={saving} style={{width:"100%",justifyContent:"center",padding:"14px"}}>
    {saving?<>{SVG.loader} Saving…</>:<>{SVG.plus} Save Entry</>}
    </button>
    </form>
    </div>
    </div>
    </>}
    {/* HISTORY TAB */}
    {activeTab==="history" && <>
    <div className="page-header">
    <h2>My History</h2>
    <p>All entries from Google Sheets</p>
    </div>
    <div className="card">
    <div className="card-header" style={{flexWrap:"wrap",gap:10}}>
    <div className="toggle-group">
    <button className={`toggle-btn ${showTodayOnly?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setShowTodayOnly(true)}>Today</button>
    <button className={`toggle-btn ${!showTodayOnly?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setShowTodayOnly(false)}>All</button>
    </div>
    <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={exportCSV} disabled={entries.length===0}>{SVG.download} CSV</button>
    </div>
    {/* Desktop table */}
    <div className="table-wrap mobile-hide" style={{margin:"0 24px 24px"}}>
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Shift</th><th>In</th><th>Out</th><th>Code</th><th>Tool</th><th>Param</th><th>Spec</th><th className="right">Qty</th><th className="right">Total</th><th className="right">Rej</th><th>Remarks</th><th></th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
    {filteredEntries.length===0
    ?<tr className="empty-row"><td colSpan={13}>{showTodayOnly?"No entries for today.":"No entries yet."}</td></tr>
    :filteredEntries.map(e=>(
    <tr key={e.id}>
    <td style={{color:"#80868b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{fmtDate(e.date)}</td>
    <td>{e.shift||"—"}</td><td style={{whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.inTime||"—"}</td><td style={{whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.outTime||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{fontWeight:500}}>{e.toolCode||"—"}</td><td style={{fontWeight:500}}>{e.toolName}</td>
    <td>{e.parameter||"—"}</td><td>{e.specification||"—"}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{fontWeight:600}}>{e.quantity}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{fontWeight:600}}>{e.totalQuantity||0}</td>
    <td className="right" style={{color:e.rejections>0?"#ea4335":"#34a853",fontWeight:600}}>{e.rejections||0}</td>
    <td style={{color:"#80868b"}}>{e.remarks||"—"}</td>
    <td style={{textAlign:"right"}}><button className="delete-btn" onClick={()=>deleteEntry(e.id)} style={{width:28,height:28,marginLeft:"auto"}}>{SVG.trash}</button></td>
    </tr>
    ))
    }
    </tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    {/* Mobile cards */}
    <div className="mobile-cards" style={{padding:"0 14px 14px"}}>
    {filteredEntries.length===0
    ?<div style={{textAlign:"center",color:"#9aa0a6",padding:"32px 0",fontSize:13}}>{showTodayOnly?"No entries for today.":"No entries yet."}</div>
    :filteredEntries.map(e=><EntryCard key={e.id} e={e} onDelete={deleteEntry}/>)
    }
    </div>
    </div>
    </>}
    </>}
    </div>
    </div>
    {/* BOTTOM NAV — mobile only */}
    <nav className="bottom-nav">
    <div className="bottom-nav-inner">
    <button className={`bnav-item ${activeTab==="dashboard"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("dashboard")}>
    {SVG.home}<span>Home</span>
    </button>
    <button className={`bnav-item ${activeTab==="add"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("add")}>
    {SVG.plus}<span>Add</span>
    </button>
    <button className={`bnav-item ${activeTab==="history"?"active":""}`} onClick={()=>setActiveTab("history")}>
    {SVG.list}<span>History</span>
    </button>
    <button className="bnav-item" onClick={handleLogout}>
    {SVG.logout}<span>Sign Out</span>
    </button>
    </div>
    </nav>
    </div>
    );
    }
    ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById("root")).render(<App/>);
    </script>
    </body>
    </html>

    Footer

    • Terms
    • Privacy
    • Security
    • Status
    • Community
    • Docs
    • Contact
    You can’t perform that action at this time.
